top_signals.title: Shell Sees LNG Trade Flat in 2026 as Hormuz Chokes Supply
top_signals.summary: Shell Plc expects global liquefied natural gas supply to be flat year-on-year — after more than a decade of growth — as the conflict in the Middle East chokes supply.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
top_signals.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Christine Lagarde: Back to basics in an uncertain environment
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
top_signals.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
top_signals.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
top_signals.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
top_signals.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: QXO is taking its offer directly to shareholders after being rebuffed on several occasions.

top_signals.title: Justices rule that cellphone location histories are protected by the Fourth Amendment
top_signals.summary: Police must get a warrant to request geofence data involving individual cellphones, the U.S. Supreme Court ruled in what represents a victory for privacy advocates.

top_signals.title: Natural Gas Falls on Shifting Weather Forecasts
top_signals.summary: U.S. natural gas futures fell after weekend updates took some of the chill out of early February weather forecasts.

alerts.title: Tether trades at 7% to 10% premium in India. Exchanges say it's just supply and demand
Manago AI, Formerly SALESmanago, Unveils New Identity and Agentic AI Capabilities to Help Brands Move Faster and Make Powerful Marketing Feel Simple

alerts.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

alerts.title: The AI Power Boom Is Reopening the Public Utility Debate
alerts.summary: Following the June 2026 primary elections in NYC, in which democratic socialist Mayor Mamdani’s preferred slate enjoyed considerable electoral success, much has been written about the political implications. Our take is really simple. The last time the democratic socialists gained power, especially in major US cities, many of their policies were adopted by Progressives or New Dealers. In either case, that meant a far more intrusive regulatory environment for utilities. The Progressives laid the foundation for our existing regulatory apparatus…
alerts.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

alerts.title: Carbon Announces Signing of Significant Growth Equity Investment from FTV Capital
alerts.summary: The investment will accelerate Carbon's growth in delegated authority underwriting by helping to scale its market-leading data and analytics platform, Graphene, and supporting expansion into new markets, including across the US
